title: Thai Green Curry Chicken
instructions: Heat curry paste in a wok until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and simmer.
Stir in Thai basil just before serving.

reviews.text: Amazing curry! I added a dash of fish sauce and squeeze of lime juice at the end for extra brightness. Also threw in some baby corn and bell peppers.
Used 2% milk instead of coconut milk for a lighter version. Added extra curry paste and topped with crushed peanuts.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
